case_title: KEVIN HENRY VS. ANTHONY ROBERT OSTOLAZA BRAVO

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND, NO ON FINAL SERVICE ATTEMPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENRY, KEVIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-23-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUANCE NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HENRY, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, ANTHONY ROBERT OSTOLAZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-19-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEVIN HENRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY ROBERT OSTOLAZA BRAVO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
